ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISCHANGED(Primary_Solution__c), ISCHANGED(Secondary_Solution__c) ), $User.Id <> Owner.Id, $Profile.Id <> '00e0O0000016TUV', $Profile.Id <> '00e0O0000016Suc', $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvc', $Profile.Id <> '00e0O0000016Sb5', $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000dZwn', $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000dZws', $Profile.Id <> '00e0O000001BCym', $Profile.Id <> '00eb00000011gwf', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Management' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permissions to edit Solution fields.
